name: cutile-rs
desc: cuTile Rust provides a safe, tile-based kernel programming DSL for the Rust programming language. It features a safe host-side API for passing tensors to async…
descFull: cuTile Rust provides a safe, tile-based kernel programming DSL for the Rust programming language. It features a safe host-side API for passing tensors to asynchronously executed kernel functions.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: cuTile Rust: Safe, data-race-free GPU kernels in Rust
